creator: crass@gmx.co.uk
text:
Found a problem with both Libreoffice and Openoffice when printing DL Envelopes.  Basically cant get the format landscape/portrait correct.  Results in printing address on envelope to be the wrong way round.  That is always prints as if there is an A4 sheet in printer - does not turn the address by 90 degrees to print sideways.

Incidentally, I do not know whether it is my set-up, but also can get the measurement to be anything other then inches.

I am en_GB where mm are normally shown/used.

The problem exists in both 10.4 and 11 of freebsd.

Cheers
